51: They were well-armed, however, so I resolved to give up on the coffee beans. But for a strapping <If(PlayerParameter(4))>lady<Else/>fellow</If> like you, contending with those thieves shouldn't be a problem! So please, I beg you─go to Oruncanca, and teach them a lesson!
